misc.text: OROCHIMARU DIED!!! #NARUTO Globe Observer (@_GlobeObserver) 🚨🚨 BREAKING: Unconfirmed reports are circulating that Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu has been killed in an Iranian attack. Netanyahu is alive and has given public statements on the U.S.-Israel strikes that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei.
